══ ROUND 1 ══

--- Tabaxi — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20

══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Tabaxi — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.

--- Tabaxi — Armored Tank --- HP: 51/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
